---
name: Invite new org member
about: This template should be used to onboard new users to the Cloud Native Valencia
  org.
title: "[Invite] <GitHub username>"
labels: help wanted
assignees: chadmcrowell, jlassery, levenhagen

---

## New member details

- **GitHub username:** [e.g. angelOlivares]
- **Full name:** 
- **Role/team:** [e.g. Volunteers 2026, Speaker, Organizer]
- **Why are they joining?** [brief reason]
- **Project access needed:** [e.g. Meetup Planning 2026]

## Checklist

- [ ] Invite user to GitHub organization
- [ ] Add user to appropriate team (e.g. Volunteers 2026)
- [ ] Grant access to relevant project boards
- [ ] Add user to relevant repos
